objective: Record whether the retained 10A-MS-08 same-day re-park candidate can be promoted from paper savings into the field packet.

Notes recent construction grading disrupted lower Harlow orientation, increasing cue risk near the neighborhood edge.

recommendation: Keep 10A as the highest-value route-mapping target, but treat the exact 10A-MS-08 split as blocked. The next optimization step is to search outward for a certifiable Avimor parking anchor, price the added connector, and regenerate the route only if residual savings beat the current 10A baseline.
